title: chelonespermum minus
intro: Chelonespermum minus, also known as the Frost Daisy or Yellow Buttons, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chelonespermum minus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its dried flowers can also be used as a herbal remedy.
